'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/rss.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=XYNUXWbZj.x9eoG5pjGhGgf.CQyth9dz5ET4Y3Dgj4M-1775473618-1.0.1.1-AM0e2mtUtcC52V3agUaEqYlrD8uP8TsMUKA4hKjEa1g"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
